---
title: "R’a-beni-lütfen"
sidebar: false 
---

This is our project webpage.

Please stay tuned to follow our project activities.

This is our template.

# R’a-beni-lütfen

1.  Enes Furkan Altın 2220469011

2.  Mehmet Öksüzoğlu 2220469036

3.  Arda Yeniçulha 2220469061

Project Title: The Quantitative Impact of USD/TRY Fluctuations on Borsa Istanbul (BIST) Indices.

Project Description: This study aims to investigate the correlation between USD/TRY exchange rate movements and the performance of various sectoral indices in Turkey. We are specifically analyzing whether currency volatility serves as a significant driver for returns in the BIST 100, Electricity (XU:ELEKT), and Industrial (XU:SIN) sectors.
# Data Set
#Key Takeaways
Research Focus: We are analyzing the quantitative relationship between the USD/TRY exchange rate and major BIST sectoral indices to identify potential sensitivities.

Data Sources: Our analysis integrates financial data from Yahoo Finance and exchange rate statistics from the Central Bank of the Republic of Turkey (EVDS).

Objective: The final report will provide insights into how macroeconomic volatility influences market resilience and sectoral stock performance in the Turkish equity market.
